questions.question: Describe the key differences between scenario-based modeling and use case modeling in the context of requirements analysis. Provide an example of each approach to illustrate your answer. (10 marks)

A user story is: "As a customer, I want to be able to track my orders online so that I can stay up-to-date with the status of my purchases." Which UML model would you use to represent this requirement, and why? (5 marks)

An actor is a: "The online banking system is accessed by the customer through a web browser. The bank's IT department is responsible for maintaining the system and ensuring its security." Which UML model would you use to represent this information, and why? (5 marks)
